---
title: "Hands-On Programming with R"
author: "Guilber"
date: 2026-07-14
categories: [Book, R, Programming]
---

## References

Grolemund, G. (2014). *Hands-On Programming with R: Write Your Own Functions and Simulations*. O'Reilly Media.

- Book site: <https://rstudio-education.github.io/hopr/>

## Purpose

::: {.callout-note}
Why this practice: what skill or gap it's meant to address.
:::

## Objective

::: {.callout-note}
What you expect to be able to do by the end of this practice — stated as a concrete, checkable outcome.
:::

## Notes

::: {.callout-note}
Replace this with your actual reading notes / exercises as you work through the book.
:::
